noticeId1.title: Water Tank Cleaning
noticeId1.content: Water supply will be unavailable from 10 AM to 1 PM on April 25 during tank cleaning.
noticeId1.author: admin@izharsms.com

noticeId2.title: Visitor Parking Update
noticeId2.content: Visitor parking has been moved to the east-side bay until repainting work is complete.
noticeId2.author: admin@izharsms.com

noticeId3.title: Maintenance Meeting
noticeId3.content: Monthly society maintenance review will be held in the clubhouse at 7 PM this Saturday.
noticeId3.author: secretary@izharsms.com

noticeId4.title: Security Drill
noticeId4.content: A fire and evacuation drill is scheduled for Sunday morning. Please cooperate with staff directions.
noticeId4.author: security@izharsms.com

complaintId1.title: Lift stops at 3rd floor
complaintId1.description: The main lift pauses for several seconds on the 3rd floor and the door sensor is slow to respond.

complaintId2.title: Water leakage near parking ramp
complaintId2.description: There is continuous seepage on the basement ramp and the floor becomes slippery after 8 PM.

complaintId3.title: Street light not working
complaintId3.description: The light near Tower B entrance has been off for two nights.

complaintId4.title: Garbage pickup delay
complaintId4.description: Wet waste was not collected this morning from the 5th floor service area.

complaintId5.title: Intercom buzzing issue
complaintId5.description: The intercom in the lobby creates static noise and disconnects after a few seconds.
